name: Pulse
description: Track, score, and attribute social media posts across platforms. Built for HEROIC esports.

name: Hemelaga
description: Store recipes, generate shopping lists, and plan meals. Shared across devices with Supabase.

name: Production Map
description: Map cameras, cables, people and equipment across multiple rooms. Built for live production planning.

name: Trækker
description: Track creator accounts across 6 social platforms, score content with engagement metrics, and manage creator rosters across workspaces.

name: Fortnite Tracker
description: Upload match results and get instant leaderboards with FNCS scoring, podium highlights, and trophy badges.
